## Checklist

Partial contributions are welcome — check off what applies, leave the rest.

- [ ] If adding new source content: verified the license on the DIKSHA page (CC BY 4.0 or CC BY-SA 4.0) and filled in `meta.license` / `meta.original_publisher`
- [ ] Segment IDs follow the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) (only relevant for new source files)
- [ ] If adding a transliteration/translation: IDs copied as-is from the source file's segment IDs

Not sure about something? Open the PR anyway and ask — happy to help get it over the line.
